name: DragonFly - Malicious File Creation
description: Detects the creation of files with names and paths known to be associated with the DragonFly APT group. This rule identifies files such as "TMPprovider*.dll" and "sysmain.dll" (or "sydmain.dll") in specific locations.

prompts.prompt: Malicious file creation associated with DragonFly APT group detected. Event Details: **Timestamp** {Timestamp}, **Event ID** {EventID}, **User** {user}, **Process Name** {process_name}, **File Path** {file_path}, **File Hash** {file_hash}. Investigate this critical activity immediately for signs of compromise by the DragonFly APT group.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the file creation event.

parameters.name: EventID
parameters.description: The Event ID for file creation events.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account who created the file.

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The process that created the file.

parameters.name: file_path
parameters.description: The full path of the created file.

parameters.name: file_hash
parameters.description: The file hash of the created file.
